text:
Also check whether the status of disabled worker
(RQTH) leads to accommodations
in these situations (this depends on companies
and collective agreements, so it is not
systematic). If this is the case, do not hesitate to
request the RÔTH (see the afa fact sheet on the subject)
If the employer refuses to let you be absent
during working hours, you will have to take
leave or RTT to attend your consultations,
treatments or tests, or arrange with the employer the
making up of work hours not completed.
Some patients prefer to systematically
take leave, so as not to have to disclose their
health condition to their employer: it is up to you to decide
according to your situation.

IN DAY HOSPITAL

Infusions for treatments or for iron,
coloscopies … are performed as day hospitalizations. In this case the hospital gives you a situation form, which has the same value as a sick leave certificate.
You must forward it to your employer and possibly
to social security as with a usual sick leave (see your HR department if you have
any doubts about the procedure to follow).
